hooks.command: fp=$(jq -r ".tool_input.file_path"); case "$fp" in */docs/logs/*.md) bn=${fp##*/}; printf "%s\n" "$bn" | grep -qE "^[0-9]{4}-[0-9]{2}-[0-9]{2}_[0-9]{6}_.+\.md$" || { printf "docs/logs/ filename must be YYYY-MM-DD_HHMMSS_slug.md (got: %s). Run: TZ=America/New_York date +%%Y-%%m-%%d_%%H%%M%%S\n" "$bn" >&2; exit 2; };; esac

branch=$(git branch --show-current 2>/dev/null); if [ -z "$branch" ]; then branch="(detached HEAD)"; fi; if [ "$branch" = "master" ]; then printf "[git] branch: %s\n" "$branch"; else printf "[git] branch: %s  (default is master — only stay off master while actively running persona-extract)\n" "$branch"; fi
